creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> I can't imagine that delphij@ would object to this patch on security/cryptopp
> 
> I even found where NetBSD was discussing it.
> http://gnats.netbsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr-single.pl?number=48134
> 
> The patch applies fine, I'm going to build it in poudriere and then commit
> an update to crypto++ first.  Who knows, it might fix other ports too.

I think it's good but since you are already on it, please test and commit if it worked.

(Can you also drop the author http://www.ibiblio.org/weidai/mailme.php a line about the fix so we can forget about it in the future?)
